task_completion.description: Access the Nx Witness system via Web Admin or REST API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser showing the Nx Witness Web Admin interface at https://localhost:7001, or a terminal/API client executing requests to the Nx Witness REST API.

task_completion.description: Rename 'Server Room (Faulty)' to 'Server Room (Decommissioned)' and disable it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VMS interface or API response shows a camera named 'Server Room (Decommissioned)' with a disabled or offline status.

task_completion.description: Rename 'New_Camera_Detected_0042' to 'Server Room Camera' and ensure it is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VMS interface or API response shows a camera named 'Server Room Camera' with an enabled or online status.

task_completion.description: Transfer the recording schedule configuration to the new camera.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The recording settings for 'Server Room Camera' show the FPS set to 7 and the quality set to 'low' (or equivalent UI representation).

task_completion.description: Document the swap in a JSON maintenance log at /home/ga/maintenance_report.json.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file explorer, or text editor showing a valid JSON file created at /home/ga/maintenance_report.json containing details about the camera replacement.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the Nx Witness VMS.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show actual navigation of the Nx Witness Web Admin UI, or genuine API requests (e.g., curl, Python requests, Postman) being executed, rather than just typing text into a mock interface.

integrity.description: The maintenance report was genuinely created on the filesystem.
integrity.visual_evidence: The JSON file is shown being edited or verified in a real text editor (like nano, vim, gedit) or via standard shell commands (like cat or echo), not just mocked in a text document.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the VMS configuration by only creating the JSON report.
integrity.visual_evidence: There must be evidence of the agent actually modifying the camera settings in the VMS (via UI or API), not just writing a JSON file claiming the task was completed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Nx Witness system is accessed at https://localhost:7001 with credentials admin / Admin1234!. The target recording schedule configuration to be transferred must have FPS=7 and Quality='low'. The final maintenance report must be saved as a valid JSON file at /home/ga/maintenance_report.json.
